style_profile.accent_role: white headline, occasional yellow accent on key word
style_profile.typography: ultra-bold condensed sans, all caps, large stacked lines
style_profile.layout: either 3D mascot front-and-center OR phone mockup with floating recipe stickers
style_profile.mockup_treatment: device tilted, food sticker bubbles with red heart attached
style_profile.callouts: circular food photos in white frames with red heart pin
